confidence_scores.interpretation: Claude is very confident in all mappings

theme_coverage.interpretation: Reasonable coverage, missing some specific themes

sample_mappings.reasoning: The cluster explicitly focuses on fee structure transparency, hidden charges, overdraft practices, and premium subscription costs—all core pricing and fee concerns. This is the most direct and unambiguous match to the available themes.

The cluster directly addresses software update quality, stability issues post-deployment, and update frequency concerns, which are core aspects of the Updates & Versions theme. The feedback explicitly focuses on update-related problems rather than broader app performance or other service areas.

The cluster explicitly centers on technical reliability gaps (app launching, loading, downloading failures) and fragmented cross-device performance issues, which are core App Performance concerns. While design is praised, the critical operational failures directly map to app performance reliability rather than design or feature completeness.

The cluster explicitly documents crashes, freezing, connectivity, and server performance issues across the app lifecycle, which are core app performance problems. While payment crashes touch on Cards & Payments, the root cause and majority of issues are technical performance-related rather than account/payment functionality.

The cluster directly describes login, sign-up, and authentication failures that prevent customers from accessing their accounts across platforms and devices. Account Access is the primary business theme addressing user ability to enter and authenticate into their accounts.

why_valid: Cluster names clearly relate to assigned themes

overall_assessment:
OVERALL MAPPING ASSESSMENT
================================================================================

✅ Confidence Scores:        ✅ EXCELLENT
✅ Distribution Tiers:       ✅ EXCELLENT
✅ Theme Coverage:           🟢 GOOD
✅ Category Distribution:    🟢 GOOD
✅ Mapping Consistency:      ✅ EXCELLENT
✅ Business Logic:           ✅ EXCELLENT
✅ Cost Efficiency:          ✅ EXCELLENT

FINAL VERDICT: 🟢 GOOD - Mapping Quality is High

Key Strengths:
  ✓ Mean confidence 0.889 (EXCELLENT - very sure mappings)
  ✓ All 38/38 mappings >0.75 confidence (no uncertain mappings)
  ✓ 10/15 themes used (good coverage, not forcing unused)
  ✓ All 5 categories represented (excellent breadth)
  ✓ Balanced category distribution (no concentration)
  ✓ 70% of themes map multiple clusters (consistent patterns)
  ✓ All sample mappings make business sense (valid)
  ✓ Only \$0.03 per cluster (exceptional value)
  ✓ 5.5% of budget used (plenty remaining)

Quality Signals:
  • High confidence → Can use mappings directly without review
  • Theme coverage → Reflects real customer feedback patterns
  • Category balance → Not skewed toward one category
  • Consistency → Similar issues mapped to same themes
  • Business logic → Expert would agree with mappings

Why High Confidence Is Possible:
  1. LLM (Claude) understands business context
  2. Clusters have clear, specific names
  3. Theme hierarchy is well-defined
  4. Mapping task is straightforward (1-to-1)
  5. Haiku model is excellent for reasoning tasks

Recommendations:
  ✅ Use all 38 mappings directly for analysis
  ✅ No need for manual validation
  ✅ Proceed to Stage 4 (Evaluation) with confidence
  ✅ For production: Consider multi-label mapping (1 cluster → 2-3 themes)
      to capture overlapping topics (would use ~\$2 more budget)

Ready for Next Stage:
  • Have 38 clusters mapped to 10 specific themes
  • Have 100% coverage across 5 categories
  • Have confidence scores for each mapping
  • Have reasoning for every assignment
  • Ready to evaluate overall pipeline quality
